clusters.title: David Hockney, iconic British artist, dies at 88
clusters.neutral_headline: Renowned British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
bullet_summary: The iconic British contemporary artist David Hockney has died, his publicist said Friday
British artist David Hockney has died at 88, his publicist said on Friday

items.title: David Hockney, iconic British artist, dies at 88
items.standfirst: David Hockney, a treasured British artist whose paintings of shimmering pools and colorful iPad drawings became icons of contemporary art, died on Friday aged 88. France 24 takes a look back at the life and career of one of the giants of the art world.
items.content: David Hockney, a treasured British artist whose paintings of shimmering pools and colorful iPad drawings became icons of contemporary art, died on Friday aged 88. France 24 takes a look back at the life and career of one of the giants of the art world.

items.title: Celebrated British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
items.standfirst: Hockney, one of the UK's most important and influential artists, has died at the age of 88.
items.content: Hockney, one of the UK's most important and influential artists, has died at the age of 88.

items.title: Renowned British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
items.standfirst: Hockney is considered an influential and defining figure in 20th and 21st century contemporary painting.
items.content: Hockney is considered an influential and defining figure in 20th and 21st century contemporary painting.

items.title: David Hockney, revolutionary British artist famed for his pools and portraits, dies aged 88
items.standfirst: Bradford-born painter, who made his name with sunkissed visions of California and never stopped breaking barriers, going on to become one of contemporary art’s most important figures, has died• ‘David Hockney caught the look of the modern world’• David Hockney’s life in picturesDavid Hockney, the iconic British painter who cast a revolutionary gaze across 20th-century art, has died aged 88.He made his name as a pop artist during the swinging 60s and was perhaps best known for his paintings of swimming pools that helped define the Los Angeles aesthetic. Works such as A Bigger Splash and Portrait of an Artist (Pool With Two Figures) depicted hedonistic scenes of love, lust and loss taking place below the city’s sun-soaked skies. Continue reading...
items.content: Bradford-born painter, who made his name with sunkissed visions of California and never stopped breaking barriers, going on to become one of contemporary art’s most important figures, has died• ‘David Hockney caught the look of the modern world’• David Hockney’s life in picturesDavid Hockney, the iconic British painter who cast a revolutionary gaze across 20th-century art, has died aged 88.He made his name as a pop artist during the swinging 60s and was perhaps best known for his paintings of swimming pools that helped define the Los Angeles aesthetic. Works such as A Bigger Splash and Portrait of an Artist (Pool With Two Figures) depicted hedonistic scenes of love, lust and loss taking place below the city’s sun-soaked skies. Continue reading...

items.title: David Hockney, giant of British contemporary art, dies at 88
items.standfirst: The iconic British contemporary artist David Hockney has died, his publicist said Friday.
items.content: The iconic British contemporary artist David Hockney has died, his publicist said Friday.

items.title: Celebrated British contemporary artist David Hockney dies at 88
items.standfirst: British artist David Hockney has died at 88, his publicist said on Friday. Hockney, one of the most influential artists of the 20th and 21st centuries, worked in a range of mediums but is best known for his vivid use of colour in paintings depicting scenes from California, Normandy and the UK.
items.content: British artist David Hockney has died at 88, his publicist said on Friday. Hockney, one of the most influential artists of the 20th and 21st centuries, worked in a range of mediums but is best known for his vivid use of colour in paintings depicting scenes from California, Normandy and the UK.

clusters.title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after years in coma
clusters.neutral_headline: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after years in coma
bullet_summary: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, a lawyer and the eldest of the king's seven children, has died at 47 after three years in a hospital, royal officials said
Reported by Al Jazeera, CBS News, Sky News World and others

items.title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after years in coma
items.standfirst: Thailand is mourning Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the king's eldest child and potential heir, who died at 47.
items.content: Thailand is mourning Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the king's eldest child and potential heir, who died at 47.

items.title: Thai princess dies at age 47 after 3 years in hospital
items.standfirst: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, a lawyer and the eldest of the king's seven children, has died at 47 after three years in a hospital, royal officials said. She was an advocate for women's rights.
items.content: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, a lawyer and the eldest of the king's seven children, has died at 47 after three years in a hospital, royal officials said. She was an advocate for women's rights.

items.content: Thailand's Princess Bajrakitiyabha has died after nearly four years in a coma, aged 47.

items.title: Thailand’s Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies aged 47 after years in a coma
items.standfirst: Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol’s health had worsened since she was hospitalised in December 2022 with heart problems that left her gravely illThe eldest child of Thailand’s King Maha Vajiralongkorn has died aged 47, the palace has said, after nearly four years in a coma.Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, known in Thailand as Princess Bha, had been in hospital since December 2022 when she became gravely ill after having heart problems while out training her dogs. Continue reading...
items.content: Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol’s health had worsened since she was hospitalised in December 2022 with heart problems that left her gravely illThe eldest child of Thailand’s King Maha Vajiralongkorn has died aged 47, the palace has said, after nearly four years in a coma.Princess Bajrakitiyabha Mahidol, known in Thailand as Princess Bha, had been in hospital since December 2022 when she became gravely ill after having heart problems while out training her dogs. Continue reading...

items.title: Trump insists Iran deal is "going to get done," backs away from Pulte as national intelligence pick
items.standfirst: President Trump is again insisting that a deal with Iran has been reached, but officials in Tehran warn there's no "final conclusion" yet. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe reports.
items.content: President Trump is again insisting that a deal with Iran has been reached, but officials in Tehran warn there's no "final conclusion" yet. CBS News' Ed O'Keefe reports.

items.content: Iran said Friday it had not yet reached a final conclusion on a deal to end the war with the U.S. despite President Trump announcing an agreement would be signed soon.

items.content: Iranian foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baqaei acknowledged a deal that President Trump said would be signed soon, saying it "had not reached a final conclusion on the agreement." CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Imtiaz Tyab report.

items.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims deal to end Iran war near

items.content: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.

items.title: Trump says deal with Iran could be signed in days
items.standfirst: President Trump said an agreement to end the war could be signed with the Iranian regime within days, but that some thorny issues would remain for later talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.
items.content: President Trump said an agreement to end the war could be signed with the Iranian regime within days, but that some thorny issues would remain for later talks. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

items.title: Iranian state media says reports of a deal are 'speculative and nothing has been finalized'
items.standfirst: After President Trump announced that U.S. strikes on Iran would be canceled due to a deal to end the war being signed in the next few days, Iranian state media responded that the reports of a deal are "speculative and nothing has been finalized." NBC News' Monica Alba, Matt Bradley and Brian Cheung report on the implications politically, abroad and on the stock market.
items.content: After President Trump announced that U.S. strikes on Iran would be canceled due to a deal to end the war being signed in the next few days, Iranian state media responded that the reports of a deal are "speculative and nothing has been finalized." NBC News' Monica Alba, Matt Bradley and Brian Cheung report on the implications politically, abroad and on the stock market.

items.title: France accuses Israeli firm of interfering in Scottish elections and targeting SNP
items.standfirst: Cyber agency says BlackCore targeted John Swinney, as well as interfering in France, New York and elsewhereFrance’s cyber-security agency has accused an Israeli firm called BlackCore of interfering in the Scottish elections earlier this year by targeting the first minister, John Swinney.The disinformation detection agency Viginum said BlackCore had used proxy social media accounts to target Swinney, the Scottish National party and the Scottish government on four occasions this year. Continue reading...

items.title: France accuses Israel’s BlackCore of meddling in elections around the world
items.standfirst: Israeli firm BlackCore, suspected of interfering in France's local elections in March, is also suspected of meddling in elections in New York City and Scotland, and operating in Angola and Togo, France's disinformation detection service, Viginum, said on Thursday.
items.content: Israeli firm BlackCore, suspected of interfering in France's local elections in March, is also suspected of meddling in elections in New York City and Scotland, and operating in Angola and Togo, France's disinformation detection service, Viginum, said on Thursday.

items.title: 'Deep mistrust' in Tehran as Iran plays down Trump's deal claims
items.standfirst: US President Donald Trump said Thursday he had called off new military strikes on Iran, claiming a breakthrough in negotiations to end the war. However, Iran quickly played down talk of an imminent deal, speaking to the "deep mistrust" Tehran has of Washington, says France 24's correspondent Reza Sayah.
items.content: US President Donald Trump said Thursday he had called off new military strikes on Iran, claiming a breakthrough in negotiations to end the war. However, Iran quickly played down talk of an imminent deal, speaking to the "deep mistrust" Tehran has of Washington, says France 24's correspondent Reza Sayah.

items.title: Oil prices fall after Trump says he is cancelling strikes – as it happened
items.standfirst: This blog is now closed – see our latest full report on the Middle East crisisThree Indian seafarers were killed in a US attack on an oil tanker earlier this week, India’s shipping minister, ‌Sarbananda Sonowal, said.“It is deeply unfortunate to learn of the tragic incident aboard the Palau-flagged MT Settebello. Sadly, three Indian seafarers initially reported missing are now confirmed dead after bodies have been located and identified,” he wrote in a post on X.The Middle East is being pulled deeper into crisis & the consequences reach far beyond the region.” Continue reading...

items.title: U.S. military says it disabled oil tanker in Gulf of Oman
items.standfirst: The U.S. military said it disabled a Palau-flagged oil tanker after it “violated the ongoing blockade by attempting to transport oil from Iran.” Three Indian seafarers who were initially reported missing after the strike were confirmed dead by India’s shipping minister.
items.content: The U.S. military said it disabled a Palau-flagged oil tanker after it “violated the ongoing blockade by attempting to transport oil from Iran.” Three Indian seafarers who were initially reported missing after the strike were confirmed dead by India’s shipping minister.

clusters.title: Thai court sentences two Uyghur men to death for 2015 Bangkok bombing
clusters.neutral_headline: Thai court sentences two Uyghur men to death for 2015 Bangkok bombing
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian World, BBC World

items.title: Thai court sentences two Uyghur men to death for 2015 Bangkok bombing
items.standfirst: Twenty people were killed and 120 injured in the attack at the Erawan Shrine, a popular tourist destinationA Thai court has handed out death sentences to two Uyghur men from the north-western Chinese region of Xinjiang for a 2015 bombing in the centre of Bangkok that killed 20 people.The explosion occurred at the Erawan Shrine in the centre of Bangkok, an area popular with foreign tourists. As well as the 20 people killed, another 120 were injured. Five of the dead were from mainland China and two from Hong Kong. Continue reading...
items.content: Twenty people were killed and 120 injured in the attack at the Erawan Shrine, a popular tourist destinationA Thai court has handed out death sentences to two Uyghur men from the north-western Chinese region of Xinjiang for a 2015 bombing in the centre of Bangkok that killed 20 people.The explosion occurred at the Erawan Shrine in the centre of Bangkok, an area popular with foreign tourists. As well as the 20 people killed, another 120 were injured. Five of the dead were from mainland China and two from Hong Kong. Continue reading...

items.title: Thai court sentences two men to death over Bangkok shrine bombing
items.standfirst: Twenty people died and 120 others were injured in the explosion at the Erawan shrine 11 years ago.
items.content: Twenty people died and 120 others were injured in the explosion at the Erawan shrine 11 years ago.
